summary: Normalize plugin governance to a pinned baseline and align manifest/config plugin specs to the custom oh-my-opencode source of truth.
root_cause: Plugin package references drifted between runtime config, bootstrap manifest, and plugin metadata, with mixed alias usage and latest-vs-pinned version policy.
fix_approach: Pinned package specs across manifest and plugin metadata, made custom oh-my-opencode authoritative in config surfaces, added missing multi-auth plugin metadata, and regenerated governance hashes.

validation.notes: Parity checker passed with matching manifest/config plugin sets and pinned specs.
